SEARCH
Package org.key_project.util.collection

Class DefaultImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableSet<T>
Type Parameters:
T - type of object to store
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Iterable<T>, ImmutableSet<T>
public class DefaultImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object> extends Object implements ImmutableSet<T>
implementation of a persistent set using the SLListOf implementation with all its implications (means e.g. O(n) for adding an element, searching for an element and so on).
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

      public ImmutableSet<T> add(T element)
      adds an element
      Specified by:
      add in interface ImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object>
      Parameters:
      element - of type that has to be added to this set
      Returns:
      a set containing all elements of this one and the specified element.

    • addUnique

      public ImmutableSet<T> addUnique(T element) throws NotUniqueException
      adds an element, barfs if the element is already present
      Specified by:
      addUnique in interface ImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object>
      Parameters:
      element - of type that has to be added to this set
      Throws:
      NotUniqueException - if the element is already present
